  "claims": [
    "SB 1299 would establish the Farmworker Climate Change Heat Injury and Death Fund.",

    "SB 1299 ensures farmworkers who suffer a work-related heat injury, illness or death as a result of working for a noncompliant employer will be treated and compensated expeditiously.",
    "SB 1299 does not create any additional workers’ compensation benefit level beyond what is otherwise available under existing workers’ compensation law.",
